title: Mousepad 19 Ribu?! Estetik Banget!

segments.visual: Close-up shot of someone rubbing their wrist in pain using a hard plastic mousepad.
segments.narration: Masih pakai alas mouse plastik keras? Nggak asik kan bestie, bikin tangan pegal!

segments.visual: Cinematic pan of the Macaron Mousepad Big Size on a clean desk.
segments.narration: Kenalin nih Macaron Mousepad Big Size, material PU leather yang super lembut dan tahan air.

segments.visual: Text overlay showing price tag popping up with a 'wow' effect.
segments.narration: Bayangin aja, varian kecilnya mulai sembilan belas ribuan! Literally murah banget, which is worth it. No cap!

segments.visual: Top-down view of hands typing and using mouse on the soft pad.
segments.narration: Ukurannya gede, area mouse dan keyboard jadi luas. Permukaannya halus, anti glare, nggak pantulin cahaya. --- Buat yang ragu, ini bukan mousepad gaming kasar, tapi deskmat soft buat kenyamanan maksimal.

segments.visual: Split screen showing student studying and remote worker gaming.
segments.narration: Cocok banget buat kamu yang sering kerja remote atau bikin desk setup estetik. Tersedia warna pastel, packaging rapi.

segments.visual: Screenshot of rating badge and sold count on mobile screen.
segments.narration: Tiga puluh ribu produk udah laku! Rating empat koma delapan sembilan! Yang udah beli bilang 'bahan lembut, sepadan sama harga'.

segments.visual: Hand pointing towards the bottom of the screen with arrow animation.
segments.narration: Penasaran detail lengkapnya? Cek di finding dot id ya, review produknya ada di sana! Jangan sampe kehabisan stok ya bestie!

cta: Cek di finding dot id ya, review produknya ada di sana!
product_title: Macaron Mousepad Big Size Deskmat For Computer Alas Meja Mouspad Komputer - PU Waterproof Mousepad
